title: Brand New Bot Trading Platform
author: No_Ad_1144
selftext:
New system BIG players involved 💰

Referral: https://member.webat12.com/#/signup?p=66741

💲 $500-$2000 (max) top up advised

🚫 No crazy deposits over $2,000 to support the longevity of the project).

🔗 Recommended to add a minimum of five 1st gens (to support the longevity of the project). If you plan to grow big, add five people per five days.

1️⃣ Once logged in, add withdrawal address - click on top right man logo> My profile> Your wallet section select edit> add and save.

2️⃣ Select deposit on the top left Menu. Copy wallet address and send funds here. Once funds hit your account select a package.

3️⃣ Go to ‘package’ on the top left menu. Select the one applicable to your deposit amount. Enter the amount of your balance in the value field and hit purchase. Once this goes through, this will appear on the reward section below. Funds will be locked for 24 hours and the timer will commence at this point. When the timer hits 24 hours your deposit amount plus profit will be released.

ℹ️ $100 gives you 2.89% cumulative. $500 gives you 3.29% cumulative. $1000 gives you 3.56% cumulative. $5000 gives you 3.98% cumulative. $10,000 gives you 4.8% cumulative. 
ℹ️ You can withdraw daily once
ℹ️ Earn 10% on your 1st gen
Earn 5% on your 2nd gen
Earn 2% on your 3rd gen
ℹ️ Contact support via telegram to get your 3% rebate on your 1st gens deposit. This will eventually become an automated process!
ℹ️ ALL exchanges compatible ERC20 + TRC20 💰
